title: County Automation Capability Audit
mission: Know Before You Go — Awareness Platform First, Route Intelligence Second
scope: Read-only automation capability audit; no county preparation, activation, runtime behavior changes, or protected-system changes.
nonGoals: Do not modify Awareness, Reporting, Route Watch, Alerts, Crossings, Supabase synchronization, Community Intelligence, or user-facing UI.

capabilities.label: Runtime boundary preparation
evidence: Canonical Census GeoJSON sources present: true
No activation/runtime mutation tool is used by V814.

capabilities.label: Crossing package building
evidence: No dedicated crossing package builder was listed or found.
